chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 778 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of main case 10.04.2025 Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Abro, Assistant Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< On the last date of hearing, the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition pertains to year, 2019 and is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution, however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 10.04.2025. Office to issue intimation notice to counsel for petitioner for the next date.” Today, neither Petitioner nor his Counsel in attendance. The conduct of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interested to pursue this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
